target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building shows complete collapse of roof and facade; structural elements are exposed and debris covers ground; no visible load-bearing walls remain intact; damage exceeds 75% of visible target area.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed damage exceeding 75% of visible area, showing complete collapse of roof and facade with exposed structural elements and debris. The scene depicts a street with a single intact vehicle parked before a heavily damaged multi-story building, surrounded by rubble and debris. The functional impact is likely severe, with the building rendered uninhabitable and the street obstructed by debris, indicating loss of infrastructure and potential safety hazards.
